title: ochrosia basistamina
intro: Ochrosia basistamina, also known as the 'yellow ochrosia' or 'yellow mangosteen', is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds which contain a high concentration of limonoids, a class of compounds with potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ochrosia basistamina include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which can help to prevent various diseases such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Ochrosia basistamina include extracts, oils, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
